body_txt: The use of foreign curses that, in their country of origin, would be considered much more offensive to use on television or outright censored. Sometimes the pronunciation is deliberately mangled to obscure it even more. Compare Pardon My Klingon , Insulting from Behind the Language Barrier , Unusual Euphemism , Did Not Do the Bloody Research , and Foreign-Language Tirade . Sometimes an adjunct of Poirot Speak . Often a way of Getting Crap Past the Radar . May occur during an Emotional Language Shift .
